item.title: University District Farmers Market
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: University Way NE between NE 50th St & NE 52nd St, Seattle

Year-round Saturday farmers market in the U-District. Fresh produce, flowers, baked goods, and artisan foods.

From University District Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Ballard Farmers Market
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: Ballard Ave NW between 20th Ave NW & 22nd Ave NW, Seattle

Year-round Sunday farmers market on Ballard Avenue NW. One of Seattle's largest and most popular markets with local produce, prepared foods, and crafts.

From Ballard Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: West Seattle Farmers Market
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: California Ave SW & SW Alaska St, Seattle

Year-round Sunday farmers market in the West Seattle Junction. Local produce, artisan foods, and community events.

From West Seattle Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Capitol Hill Farmers Market
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: E Barbara Bailey Way between Broadway & 10th Ave E, Seattle

Year-round Sunday farmers market on Capitol Hill featuring local farms, food vendors, and community gathering.

From Capitol Hill Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Columbia City Farmers Market
item.description:
Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: 37th Ave S & S Edmunds St, Seattle

Seasonal Wednesday evening farmers market in Columbia City, one block from the light rail station. Runs May through October.

From Columbia City Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Wallingford Farmers Market
item.description:
Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Wallingford neighborhood, Seattle

Seasonal Wednesday evening farmers market in Wallingford. Runs May through September.

From Wallingford Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Capitol Hill Tuesday Farmers Market
item.description:
Tuesday, June 2, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: E Barbara Bailey Way, Capitol Hill, Seattle

Seasonal Tuesday evening farmers market on Capitol Hill. Runs June through September.

From Capitol Hill Tuesday Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Lake City Farmers Market
item.description:
Thursday, June 4, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: NE 125th St & 28th Ave NE, Seattle

Seasonal Thursday afternoon farmers market in Lake City. Runs June through September.

From Lake City Farmers Market

Event details

item.title: Magnolia Farmers Market
item.description:
Saturday, June 6, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Magnolia neighborhood, Seattle

Seasonal Saturday farmers market in the Magnolia neighborhood. Runs June through October.

From Magnolia Farmers Market
